vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of critical failure. The expected specimens (P1-P4) are not visible as living botanical entities. The pots contain only soil and debris.

plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains white rabbit anchor; no Pothos foliage detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears desiccated and dark; no signs of active root systems or moisture.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, crystalline or shell-like fragments on the surface of the black pot (P3/P4 area).

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: No significant change; pots appear empty.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-2: Minor shift in lighting/shadows; no botanical growth observed.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Severe reduction in ambient light levels; the biome remains devoid of visible plant life.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of the registered plants (String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Pothos, Silver Guest). The environment is essentially a collection of empty containers.
anomalies: White rabbit anchor is present but isolated.
Total absence of expected vegetation across all pots.
Extreme low-light conditions in recent frames obscuring surface detail.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots, which should house P1 through P4, contain only soil and the white rabbit anchor. There is no evidence of recent growth, decay, or even remnants of the plants. The environment appears to have been cleared or the plants have suffered total systemic loss prior to the start of this observation sequence.
